THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. MINI MINUTES: RE: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Off calendar. The Hernandez declaration does not show parties met and conferred in person, by telephone, or by video conference, as required by CCP 435.5.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
